contextBar.tooltip: The selected academic year applies across all pages.

1.title: Welcome to Pardisan
1.subtitle: Offline school finance management — your data stays on this device only.

points.offline: Works without internet — log payments and expenses anytime.
points.local: Data stays on your device and is never sent to a server.
points.backup: Export a JSON backup from Settings and restore it on another device.

2.title: Your profile
2.subtitle: Your name and academic year for this session.
2.userNameHint: Your name appears on reports and transaction logs.
2.termYearHint: Example: 1404-1405 — you can change this later from the bar at the top.

3.title: Starting data
3.subtitle: Start with sample data or from scratch.

demo.title: Start with demo data
demo.description: Sample school, students, staff, and transactions to explore the app.

empty.title: Start empty
empty.description: No preloaded data — best when you have real records to enter.

firstPaymentCta.title: Record your first payment
firstPaymentCta.subtitle: Use the finance dashboard to log student income or staff expenses.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: Overview of key reports and the latest operator logs.
home.name: Name

recentLogs.title: 10 Recent Logs
recentLogs.subtitle: The latest changes recorded by operators.
recentLogs.empty: No logs for this term yet.

finance.title: Finance Dashboard
finance.subtitle: Analytical view for founders and data entry for operators.

founders.subtitle: Add and manage school contacts and stakeholders.
founders.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this founder?

schools.subtitle: Add and edit schools and branches.
schools.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this school?

fixedCosts.title: Fixed Costs
fixedCosts.subtitle: Rent, utilities, and other recurring expenses included in profit calculations.
fixedCosts.empty: No fixed costs for this term yet.
fixedCosts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this fixed cost?

operator.title: Operator Logger
operator.subtitle: Record student revenue and employee expenses for the selected term.

errors.operatorNameRequired: Enter your operator name in the header above to submit entries.

messages.directoryBackupSaved: Backup saved to the selected folder.

validation.phone: {field} must be a valid phone number (10–11 digits starting with 0)
validation.paymentMethod: Payment method must be one of: {values}
validation.transactionType: Transaction type must be one of: {values}

conflict.schoolHasStudents: Cannot delete school with existing students
conflict.schoolHasEmployees: Cannot delete school with existing employees
conflict.schoolHasStudentTransactions: Cannot delete school with existing student transactions
conflict.schoolHasEmployeeTransactions: Cannot delete school with existing employee transactions
conflict.studentHasTransactions: Cannot delete student with existing transactions
conflict.employeeHasTransactions: Cannot delete employee with existing transactions

relation.studentNotInSchool: Student does not belong to the provided school
relation.employeeNotInSchool: Employee does not belong to the provided school

backup.invalidFormat: Backup file has an invalid structure
backup.missingCollection: Collection "{filename}" is missing from the backup
backup.invalidCollection: Collection "{filename}" in the backup is invalid
backup.duplicateId: Duplicate ID "{id}" found in the backup

directoryBackup.unsupported: Folder backup is not supported in this browser
directoryBackup.permissionDenied: Write permission for the backup folder was denied
directoryBackup.writeFailed: Could not write the backup file

students.title: Student Management
students.subtitle: Add students, edit details, and record payments for the selected term.
students.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this student?
students.confirmDeletePayment: Are you sure you want to delete this payment?

employees.title: Staff Management
employees.subtitle: Add staff, edit details, and record expenses for the selected term.
employees.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this staff member?
employees.confirmDeleteExpense: Are you sure you want to delete this expense?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage local profile, backups, and data storage.

profile.title: Local Profile
profile.subtitle: This device's install ID. Operator name and term year can be set from the bar at the top of the page.
profile.installIdHint: Unique ID for this app install — useful for support or recovery.

storage.title: Local Storage
storage.subtitle: Browser data retention status and space usage.
storage.warning: Clearing browser data or uninstalling the app may delete all information. Regular backups are essential.
storage.unsupported: Browser does not support the Storage API
storage.persisted: Enabled — browser is less likely to evict data
storage.notPersisted: Disabled — data may be cleared when storage is low
storage.persistDenied: Request denied — browser may still evict data.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.subtitle: Full JSON export of all data, or complete replacement from a backup file.
backup.importConfirm: All current data will be replaced with "{filename}". This cannot be undone.
backup.resetSubtitle: Remove all real data and replace with anonymous demo data.
backup.resetConfirm: Are you sure? All current data will be deleted and replaced with demo data.

folder.title: Automatic folder backup
folder.subtitle: Save a daily JSON file to a folder on this device. Changes are saved automatically after each edit.
folder.unsupported: Folder backup requires a browser with the File System Access API (such as Chrome or Edge on desktop). On Safari and iOS, use JSON export above.

pwa.title: Install App
pwa.subtitle: Add Pardisan to your home screen for offline access.
pwa.installed: App is installed on this device.
pwa.installAvailable: Install is available — add the app to your home screen.
pwa.installDismissed: Install prompt dismissed. Use your browser menu to install later.
pwa.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in Safari.
pwa.iosStep3: Confirm the name and tap Add.
pwa.androidStep1: Tap Install app above, or open the browser menu.
pwa.androidStep2: Choose "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
pwa.desktopStep1: Use the install icon in the address bar, or the browser menu.
pwa.desktopStep2: Confirm installation to open the app in its own window.
